title: Doja Cat issues apology after Twitch mods ban PlaqueBoyMax unexpectedly
summary_full: Doja Cat faced a Twitch controversy after moderators banned a supportive viewer, PlaqueBoyMax, during her live stream.  The rapper clarified on X that the ban was not her decision and she was unhappy with her moderation team's actions. She promised to review her mods to prevent similar incidents, emphasizing fairness for her viewers.
